text:
おう、お疲れ様。
またよろしく頼む。

おう、できたな。
いい出来だ、礼を言おう。

Wow, great job.
Until we met again.

Wow, well done.
Thanks for doing such an excellent job.

大したものだな。
こんなにいい出来になるとはな。
またよろしく頼む。

期待以上だな。
まさかオレの予想を上回るとはな。
また頼む。

素晴らしい！
文句なしの良作だな！
次もよろしく頼む。

Fantastic job.
It's amazing what you have done.
See you around.

You've exceeded expectations
far beyond what I thought possible.
Until next time.

Excellent! There's literally nothing bad I say
about such great work! I'll be counting on
you again in the future.
